mapping_policy.verified: exact dress name or near-exact unique OCR evidence
mapping_policy.high: unique OCR evidence with score and margin gates
mapping_policy.candidate: retained for review and never emitted by default
mapping_policy.status_scope: ownership plus installed static palette metadata and observed wardrobe palette/evolution fields; intent always fails closed
mapping_policy.full_status: emitted from a complete image-slot mapping or exact static suite membership, independent of legacy detail-image availability
mapping_policy.mark_scope: each owned suite member is marked after the detail-image part order has been cross-validated against 114 complete collages
mapping_policy.suite_id_encoding: FashionSuite type-1 item IDs decode as 2 * fashion_index; all 6504 installed members resolve after decoding
mapping_policy.slot_order: fashion part order with tattoos after special accessories; reproduced all 114 complete suite-backed collages
mapping_policy.coordinate_model: normalized four-column centers scaled to the target image width, preserving the mini-program intrinsic-width marker offset
mapping_policy.lottery_pool_id: first three active lottery_cfg suit_id values matched uniquely to the release suite_id, plus explicit legacy exceptions
mapping_policy.lottery_count_basis: 148 = 142 unique suite matches + 6 current-version special exceptions, including lx29/pp29 in pool 82
mapping_policy.background_scene_id: unique OCR-to-installed lock name, or explicit manual confirmation
mapping_policy.background_shot_src_id: command-740 tmp_id values derived from each scene lock row's unlock_way target; client relevance_unlock aliases are included after resolving their unlock_way targets
mapping_policy.background_ownership: command 740 op_type=1 field6 tmp_id directly equals the shot_cfg.Scene lock_id; command 637 contains portrait IDs and is excluded from background ownership
